markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, strategy, and 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Use Case Guides:** Performance is "okay." Strategy shifts from broad SEO to high-intent keywords by splitting long guides, adding FAQs, and improving internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Integration Pages:** The current batch is nearly complete (520/676). The next phase (v2) will find new topics and enrich top-performing existing pages with FAQs, screenshots, and better linking.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Partner Edits:** Liz will draft a process for partner-requested edits by the end of January to formalize the current ad-hoc system.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**New Content Model:** A resource-heavy, experience-driven model (e.g., "Augment Code") is a potential direction for Use Case Guides, aligning with Google's focus on authoritative content.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Topics

### Use Case Guides: Strategy Shift

  - [**Problem:** Current performance is "okay," but the broad SEO approach is underperforming compared to the successful Integration Pages.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot to a high-intent keyword strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Split long guides into smaller, focused pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [Add FAQs and improve internal linking to capture high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [**Process:** Raymond is reviewing guides; Liz will manage the rework and republishing.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Meta images remain unfixed. Liz will continue to follow up.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Integration Pages: Scaling & Enrichment

  - [**Status:** 520 of 676 pages are published.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Phase 2 (v2):**](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [**New Content:** Find new high-ranking integration topics.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [**Enrichment:** Retroactively improve top-performing existing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**v2 Quality Benchmark:**](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [FAQ enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Clear screenshots & lightweight media](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
      - [Improved internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [**Performance:** A holiday dip in clicks has already recovered.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Partner Edit Process

  - [**Need:** A formal process for partners to request edits to integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**Context:** The current ad-hoc system is informal but functional, with only 2–3 requests in December.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**Plan:** Liz will draft a process by the end of January, considering a potential partner-facing interface.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

### 2026 Content Strategy

  - [**Developer Hub:** In progress (Owner: Jason).](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**Partnership Request Process:** In progress.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [**New Content Model:** A resource-heavy, experience-driven model (e.g., "Augment Code") was presented as a potential direction for Use Case Guides.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Aligns with Google's focus on authoritative content and better detects AI-generated text.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Method:** Sections must be standalone and example-driven; removing an example breaks the section's logic.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [**Category Refresh:** Blocked pending approval from Vivian. Zach will investigate the status.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Raymond:** Review the second Use Case Guide today.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [**Liz:** Draft a partner edit process by the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [**Liz:** Find a Webflow contact for the Integration Page v2 benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [**Zach:** Investigate the status of the Category Refresh approval.](https://fathom.video/share/dVRdtxDn2xf8i52ANcNnuAisHHbeuYY6?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
